name: call_logs
description: Manage call logs — add a call log, attach an audio file to the call log, get all call logs assigned to a particular user. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The ID of the owner of the call log. Please note that a user without account settings access cannot create call logs for other users.

parameters.name: activity_id
parameters.description: If specified, this activity will be converted into a call log, with the information provided. When this field is used, you don't need to specify `deal_id`, `person_id` or `org_id`, as they will be ignored in favor of the values already available in the activity. The `activity_id` must refer to a `call` type activity.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The name of the activity this call is attached to

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: The duration of the call in seconds

parameters.name: outcome
parameters.description: Describes the outcome of the call

parameters.name: from_phone_number
parameters.description: The number that made the call

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: The date and time of the start of the call in UTC. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: The date and time of the end of the call in UTC. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.

parameters.name: person_id
parameters.description: The ID of the person this call is associated with

data.subject: Just call me maybe
data.note: A note for the call log
